title: Bygone Fortress Plus
description: Adds the original fortress from the Bygone Nether Mod - a port of Bygone Fortress to modern versions.
body: ## Overview Bygone Fortress Plus overhauls the vanilla fortress, giving it a more grand scope. This fortress was originally present in the [Bygone Nether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bygone-nether) mod, then the [Bygone Fortress](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bygone-fortress) mod, and now here in an updated port. ## FAQ - Will this mod be ported to other versions/loaders? - This port is available for the main modding versions, 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, and will be kept up to date with the latest version of Minecraft. No backports are planned/necessary, play the original mod. ## License [![Code license (MIT)](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20license-MIT-green.svg?style=flat-square)](github.com/cassiancc/bygone-fortress) Bygone Fortress Plus is available under the open source MIT License, matching the original mod. ## Credits This is a port of [Bygone Fortress](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bygone-fortress) to Forge 1.20.1 and Fabric 1.21.1 that I made for modpacks currently in development. Bygone Fortress is available under [MIT License](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bygone-fortress#license), but has not been worked on in two years.
